title: Looking for a developer to build an app
excerpt:

posts.author: Eda6195 (Emily Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guys,
I’d like to get a rough cost in building a scheduling app. We have field techs in 3 states and I want to be able to press a button in Monday and get the next 5 times that appointment could be booked. This would basically need to be able to read all the field staffs schedules and calculate travel time between existing appointments and then see if the appointment your booking would fit and also use a numbers column for the duration of that appointment… far more in-depth then that but that’s the gist of it!
Thanks,
Emily
